added: 5 module slots (patch 3.7): optimizer enumerates, scores, and applies 5-module combinations.
Apply verify-and-retry: after the plan runs, the equipped set is re-checked and server-ignored equips are re-issued once; persistent failures name the stuck slots.
fixed: Floor-aware candidate pool: attribute minimums (e.g. Life Wave >= 20) no longer report 'no combination' when an abundant co-target crowds the scarcer attribute out of the pool.
Apply steps are paced (~300 ms) so rapid equips are not dropped by the server.
